about.title: About Me
about.description: I am a full-stack developer with experience designing and maintaining large web services (PHP, JavaScript, Node.js, Python, Drupal). I combine technical expertise with a practical understanding of UX and SEO, enabling me to deliver solutions that are both efficient and user-friendly. In my work, I value clear communication with business stakeholders and a proactive approach to quality—from design to automated testing. I have experience providing technical consultations to Marketing, SEO, and Advertising teams, suggesting technical solutions, and leading technical discussions with external service providers. I advise project teams and optimize development processes, ensuring both code quality and the usability of the applications I help build.
